instruction: Find the latest open issue in "openclaw/openclaw" with label "bug", and save it as "#<number> | <labels> | <title>" to "$HOME/Desktop/gh_open_issues_2_1.txt". If no matching issue is found, save an empty file.
reference_command: gh issue list --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open --search 'label:"bug" sort:created-desc' --limit 1 --json number,title,labels --jq '.[] | "#\(.number) | \(([.labels[].name] | if length == 0 then "none" else join(",") end)) | \(.title)"' > "$HOME/Desktop/gh_open_issues_2_1.txt"

parameters.expected_command: gh issue list --repo openclaw/openclaw --state open --search 'label:"bug" sort:created-desc' --limit 1 --json number,title,labels --jq '.[] | "#\(.number) | \(([.labels[].name] | if length == 0 then "none" else join(",") end)) | \(.title)"'
